definition: Later iterations cite prior iteration findings as 'established' while the original evidence base (~420 months, ~6-8 unwind episodes) has not expanded. Confidence-weighted claim count has grown from ~20 to ~80+ while data is constant, creating authority-anchoring on the program's own output. Zero scored predictions across 4 iterations (calibration stasis).
evidence: Iter_0008 analyses cite iter_0007 as 'established' which cited iter_0006
Debate pair_3: 'factually correct and methodologically devastating'
open_questions: Whether analytical refinement of fixed data is legitimate or epistemically degenerative
Program should commit to scoring at least 3 time-bound predictions by iter_0012
